title: Nicholas Scratch
content:
{{Character |image = Nicholas Scratch.png |real name = Nicholas Scratch{{Ref|AAA101}} |alias = {{Alias |derivatives = Nicky{{Ref|AAA101}}}} |species = [[Human]]-[[Cosmic Entities|Cosmic Entity]] [[Hybrid]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|ENG}}
{{Citizenship|GRBR2}} |DOB = [[Before 20th Century#1750|1750]]{{Ref|AAA109}} |DOD = [[Before 20th Century#1756|1756-1757]][https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-features/agatha-all-along-finale-jac-schaeffer-wanda-1236052231/ ‘Agatha All Along’ Boss Jac Schaeffer on Forgoing Wanda in Finale: “It Didn’t Feel Fair to Agatha”] |gender = Male |tv series = ''[[Agatha All Along]]'' (2 episodes) |actor = [[Abel Lysenko]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|I spoke no spell. I said no incantation. You... You were made from scratch.|[[Agatha Harkness]]|Maiden Mother Crone}} '''Nicholas Scratch''' was the son of [[Agatha Harkness]] and [[Death]]. ==Biography== {{Expand}} ===Life=== {{Quote|I can offer only time.|[[Death]] to [[Agatha Harkness]]|Maiden Mother Crone}} As [[Agatha Harkness]] was giving birth to her son, his other parent, [[Death]], came, intending to take him. Harkness pleaded with Death not to take him and she accepted, telling her that she could only give him more time, causing Nicholas to be born frail and sickly. As she admired her newborn son, Harkness said that he was made from scratch and naming him Nicholas Scratch. As he grew up, Nicholas would lure witches to Harkness so that she could drain their power and kill them. Nicholas asked why she did this, but Harkness responded that they needed to do this to survive, and that she could not protect him from what was coming for him. They would spend days singing songs and killing witches, eventually, one song in particular became the [[Ballad of the Witches' Road]].{{Ref|AAA109}} ===Death=== After singing the Ballad one day, Nicholas was offered food and shelter by a woman, who was in truth a witch, offering to care for him alongside her covenmates. Nicholas, who knew full well what would happen to them if he agreed to go with them, declined, quickly retreating to the woods followed by his mother. After he apologized to his mother for failing to properly lure the witches to her and promised to help her to kill more witches tomorrow, Agatha forgave her son and the two then sang the Ballad as they settled in for the night, with the two falling asleep in the woods. During the night, Nicholas woke up and saw Death, who had come to claim him. Before going to the afterlife, Death told Nicholas to say goodbye to his mother. Nicholas then kissed his mother one last time and went with Death to the afterlife, passing away in his sleep from his illness.{{Ref|AAA109}} ===Legacy=== {{Quote|Did you know [[Agatha Harkness|she]] traded her own child for the [[Book of the Damned]]?|[[Jennifer Kale]] to [[Billy Maximoff]]|Through Many Miles / Of Tricks and Trials}} Following his death and burial, Harkness began using the tale of the Witches’ Road to lure unsuspecting witches into forming a coven with her and provoke them into blasting her, draining their powers for herself.{{Ref|AAA109}} Due to her infamous reputation, rumors began to circulate around the witch community that Harkness had traded Scratch away for the [[Darkhold]].{{Ref|AAA103}} In [[2026]], Harkness and her [[Agatha Harkness' Coven|coven]] [[Walking of the Witches' Road|embarked]] on the [[Witches' Road]]. During the [[Spirit Witch Trial]], Scratch was able to communicate with [[Billy Maximoff]] through a Ouija board and revealed his name to him. When Maximoff yelled Scratch's name out loud, Scratch told Harkness, who was killing [[Alice Wu-Gulliver]] by draining her [[magic]], to stop, although it was too late.{{Ref|AAA105}} Harkness later admitted to Maximoff that she was afraid of dying because she was afraid of facing her son in the afterlife, although Maximoff was sure that Scratch would forgive his mother for everything she did.{{Ref|AAA109}} ==Relationships== ===Family=== *[[Evanora Harkness]] † - Grandmother *[[Agatha Harkness]] † - Mother *[[Death]] - Father{{Ref|RioNicky}} *[[Eternity]] - Uncle *[[Infinity]] - Aunt *[[Entropy]] - Cousin *[[Eon]] - Cousin ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|AAA109}} (flashbacks) *{{Appearance|AAA101}} (mentioned; illusion) *{{Appearance|AAA102}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|AAA103}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|AAA104}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|AAA105}} (voice) *{{Appearance|AAA108}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|AAA109}} (mentioned) ==Trivia== *In the comics, Nicholas Scratch is the son of [[Agatha Harkness]] and the father of the [[Salem Seven|Salem's Seven]]. ==Gallery== Agatha Harkness giving birth.png Nicholas Scratch is born.png Nicholas Scratch (1750s New England).png Nicholas Scratch and Agatha Harkness.png Agatha Harkness and Nicholas Scratch.png ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} [[Category:Agatha All Along Characters]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Cosmic Entities]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
